**Share this link:**

## https://freestuff-dartmouth-v2.vercel.app/map

I pushed `main` to GitHub, Vercel auto-deployed, and I confirmed the production page returns HTTP 200 with the hero, the place pins (Hopkins Center et al.), and the interactive map data all rendering. It's also now reachable from the **Map** link in the site nav.

Whoever you share it with will see: the Leaflet map centered on campus with 11 building pins plus the Green "WiFi" anchor, click-to-open resource panels, and â€” even with JavaScript off or on a screen reader â€” the full accessible text list of every place and all 58 online resources.

One honest caveat I flagged earlier still stands: I verified everything automatable, but I haven't eyeballed the live map to confirm each pin sits exactly on its bâ€¦
